The group also said it targeted…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed further attacks on Israeli targets on Saturday. The group said it struck newly established Israeli artillery positions in Yaron, a gathering of vehicles and troops at Tell Freiz in Ainata, and another gathering in Al‑Qantara square. It also reported a sniper shot that hit an Israeli soldier near the Khiam prison, and a rocket barrage on Kiryat Shmona. @wfwitness

The Ministry of Agriculture requested the Ports and Maritime Organisation to facilitate passage for vessels transporting basic commodities and livestock feed, in line with government and armed forces approval. @wfwitness

Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: Iran's position is being misrepresented by U.S. media. We are deeply grateful to Pakistan for its efforts and have never refused to go to Islamabad. What we care about are the terms of a conclusive and lasting END to the illegal war that is imposed on us.

⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇦🇪 The UAE Ministry of Foreign Affairs expresses its strong condemnation and denunciation of the riots, attempted vandalism, and attacks on its embassy and the residence of the head of mission in Damascus. The UAE also called on Syria to ensure the safety of its embassy and staff and to investigate the circumstances of the attacks. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The head of the Mateh Asher Regional Council warned residents that according to information from security forces, fire from Lebanon toward the western Galilee is expected soon, urging them to stay near protected spaces. However, the IDF said there is no unusual information regarding widespread Hezbollah fire to the north in the near future. @wfwitness

🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Threats Did Not Materialize 📝 Hungary continues gas supplies to Ukraine An immediate fuel rupture between the Kyiv regime and Budapest did not occur: in March, so-called Ukraine continued to receive gas via the Hungarian route. According to data from the "GTS Operator," approximately 40% of so-called Ukraine's received imports are, by estimates, resources of Russian origin that entered the system through Hungary and Slovakia. The formal ban that Orbán mentioned takes effect only from June , and until then Ukrainian energy operates in a "transition period" mode — with political statements at the level of leaders and fully functional contracts at the level of companies. ❗️ The Kyiv regime has developed a rather convenient model: publicly attack Orbán, while in practice using the Hungarian corridor for gas and energy supplies, since Budapest is not going for a radical break anyway. And this, naturally, only strengthened Zelensky's sense of impunity toward Europe, at whose expense he lives: if even the EU members he has insulted the most wipe their tears and continue to milk him, there is no reason to stop. #Hungary #Ukraine #energy 👁 @evropar — on the threshold of Europe's death 💸 Support us Original msg

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 The governor of Khuzestan Province said that US‑Israeli strikes hit several petrochemical units in the province, causing damage. Firefighting operations were carried out quickly. The smoke spreading in the air is from the release of flare gases…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Press TV: US‑Israeli airstrikes targeted six petrochemical plants in Iran’s southwestern Khuzestan province, leaving at least five wounded. The strikes hit facilities in eastern and western Mahshahr, including Fajr 1, Fajr 2, Rejal, Abu Ali, Bandar Emam and Amir Kabir. The Shalamcheh border crossing with Iraq was also severely damaged. All employees have been evacuated and electricity to the region cut off. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Several graduates and students of Amirkabir University have been killed in US‑Israeli strikes, the university announced. Among the dead are Ali Nazem (master’s student), Erfan Sadeghi (mechanical engineering graduate), Mojdeh Zandi (electrical engineering graduate), Dr Saeed Shamghadri (biomedical and electrical engineering graduate), Mehdi Abbasi (power engineering graduate), Mohammad Mehdi Sharifi Jazhe (former aerospace student), Seyed Saeed Najafi (civil engineering graduate) and Mohammad Amin Zohrabi (chemical engineering graduate). @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 The Iranian army said its drones struck targets at Israel’s Ben Gurion Airport, including the new control tower, the Terminal 1 and Terminal 2 control towers, navigation systems, and airport antennas and radars. The operation aimed to disrupt military air traffic control, prevent the direction of U.S. and Israeli fighter jets, and blind surveillance and electronic warfare systems. The army vowed that revenge for "Iranian martyrs" will continue without pause. @wfwitness
🇮🇷 What's left of the USAF F-15E that was shot down in Iran is being cleaned up. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇯🇵🇴🇲🇮🇷 Kan: Ships from France, Japan and Oman have crossed the Strait of Hormuz, presumably in coordination with Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇧🇭 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 Ship transits through the Strait of Hormuz are continuing as diplomatic and military efforts to reopen the waterway take shape. France has recently pressed Bahrain to soften the language of a draft UN Security Council resolution on Hormuz. A UN discussion scheduled for today has been postponed and is likely to take place early next week. @wfwitness

Renowned Political Economist Prof. Carlos Lopes Africa is part of the war somehow. South Africa took Israel to ICC along with others. Netanyahu is currently under court mandate. Djibouti hosts multiple military bases, with access to Bab el Mandeb Strait, the alternative to Hormuz. The entire region is seen as very important strategically by UAE, Saudi, Israel. That's why we see so much volatility in the horn. Diego Garcia in Mauritius was used for the war, now contested by President Trump. Africa has a number of dependencies from that region that will be exacerbated in the war. FULL INTERVIEW
🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 | Several points in the Tel Aviv region were hit with Iranian missile submunitions. There are several injuries. @FotrosResistancee

Clash Point host Isaac Eshetu sits with Prof. Carlos Lopes, former Executive Secretary of the UN Economic Commission for Africa and leading African political economist, to examine how the war involving Iran is reshaping Africa’s economic and geopolitical position. • Is Africa part of the war? • How is it Impacted? • Is the shock temporary? WATCH

🇮🇷 💥 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 : IRGC Public Relations, Wave 95 of True Promise 4: ➡️ "A large-scale, multi-domain operation by the IRGC Naval and Aerospace forces was executed this morning across the broader West Asia region and the occupied Palestinian territories — in Wave 95 — with trust in Almighty God, under the code name "Ya Hassan ibn Ali (peace be upon him)", dedicated to Bibi Maryam, Ali Mardan Khan Bakhtiari, and all the brave men of Lor — using Haj Qasem, Khaybar Shekan , and Qadr missiles . ➡️ The following targets were struck and destroyed: 💬 US Army HIMARS systems on Bubiyan Island, Kuwait 💬 A US Patriot air defense system in northern Bahrain 💬 Assembly points of US MLRS/rocket artillery crews 💬 Assembly points of senior US commanders and military advisors in the "Seilbaneh" area, UAE 💬 Oracle Corporation AI technology facility (American) in the UAE ➡️ A commercial vessel named MCS Ishika , owned by the Zionist regime and sailing under a third-party flag, was struck by powerful IRGC Naval projectiles at Khalifa bin Salman Port, Bahrain. ➡️ Additionally, the following locations in occupied Palestine were subjected to heavy and sustained strikes using multi-warhead Qadr missiles: Bnei Brak, Petah Tikva, Tel Aviv, Ramat Gan , and Kiryat Shmona . ➡️ This wave is ongoing. Reports of offensive actions will be communicated to the grateful Iranian nation. " 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

The UAE says it intercepted 23 ballistic missiles and 56 drones from Iran today (April 4). Since this round of attacks began in late February, the UAE says it has intercepted 498 ballistic missiles, 23 cruise missiles, and 2,141 drones.

🇮🇹 🇶🇦 Qatar and Italy Push for Regional Stability and Energy Cooperation. During a high-level summit in Doha today, Emir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni held talks centered on easing global tensions and safeguarding energy supplies. The two leaders engaged in a comprehensive review of the current international landscape, emphasizing a shared commitment to de-escalation and the reinforcement of energy security frameworks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Two U.S. HC-130J Combat King II rescue tankers departed Stuttgart Army Airfield and are heading toward the Middle East, strongly indicating the search for the missing F-15E crew member is still active and likely expanding. The HC-130J is specifically used to support combat search-and-rescue, especially by refueling HH-60/Pave Hawk rescue helicopters in flight.

Iran’s state media says fishermen found wreckage of a downed U.S. MQ-9 Reaper near Bushehr, but OSINT analysts say it’s almost certainly not an MQ-9. The debris appears to match a Chinese-made Wing Loong II, likely operated by a regional state such as Saudi Arabia or the UAE. This is at least the second Wing Loong II wreckage found by Iranian forces. Either Saudi Arabia or UAE is actively involved in operations against Iran along with U.S. and Israel. Source: fab_hinz

RFI says Ukraine hit two tankers, including Qendil, with 12 Russian intel officers onboard posing as sailors. Two more officers were killed and seven wounded. Visioner 👀 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Foreign Intelligence Service: ❗️ A large-scale collapse has begun in the infrastructure of data centers in Russia: outdated equipment is massively failing, and due to sanctions and the costs of the war with Ukraine, the Russian Federation is practically unable to replace it in a timely and complete manner. 👉 Over the past 6 months, the number of failures has significantly increased in small commercial data centers (processing data centers) and local IT sites of companies. 🔸 According to market participants, the problem has already affected about 20% of commercial data centers. 📌 The same situation applies to fiber-optic networks laid in the early 2000s. The warranty period for the main cables in the "West-East" direction expired in 2025. tweet
